function createPromiseWithResolvers() {
    // Shim of Stage 4 Promise.withResolvers proposal
    let resolve;
    let reject;
    const promise = new Promise((res, rej)=>{
        resolve = res;
        reject = rej;
    });
    return {
        resolve: resolve,
        reject: reject,
        promise
    };
} //# sourceMappingURL=promise-with-resolvers.js.map
